profile.name: Muneeb Ur Tarantino
profile.role: System-Level Engineer | Firmware Forensics | Binary Translation
profile.philosophy: Precision isn't obsessive — it's professional. Whether you're cutting vinyl or translating binaries, the standard is the same: zero tolerance for preventable errors. I don't stop at the assigned layer. I trace the signal through every boundary, because a bug at any link breaks the entire product.

helix.title: Project HELIX — Windows x86/x64 to Android ARM64 Game Converter
helix.overview: A high-performance game translation runtime with an extensible plugin architecture. Converts Windows x86/x64 games into Android ARM64 APK+OBB packages with full asset pipeline integration.

mechanisms.name: AOT Compilation & JIT Fallback
mechanisms.desc: Pre-compiles execution paths while using dynamic runtime fallback for untranslated code segments.

mechanisms.name: The Padding Principle
mechanisms.desc: Preserves 100% shader compatibility by copying the smallest mip-level to all higher levels, preventing fatal shader binding errors.

mechanisms.name: Zero-Coupling Plugin System
mechanisms.desc: Swappable modules (Execution, Graphics, Audio, Input) loaded dynamically at runtime via dlopen().

mechanisms.name: Windows Converter Pipeline
mechanisms.desc: Auto-detects PE headers, imports, section layouts, and patches IAT trampolines for API hooks.

yeti.title: Project YETI — Distributed Firmware Forensics Orchestrator
yeti.overview: A production-ready firmware diagnostics and forensics suite engineered specifically for embedded systems and automotive ECUs.

mechanisms.name: Surgical Extraction
mechanisms.desc: Targeted mining of highly proprietary embedded binary structures.

mechanisms.name: VFS Navigation
mechanisms.desc: Implements virtual filesystem navigation and on-the-fly vendor header transformations.

mechanisms.name: Orchestration Layer
mechanisms.desc: Unified structural execution of binwalk-rs and backhand binaries.

mechanisms.name: Status
mechanisms.desc: Codebase published as-is on GitHub; development frozen to focus resource bandwidth 100% on HELIX.

sasquatch.title: Sasquatch Universal Builder — DevOps & Reverse Toolchain
sasquatch.overview: An automated build-automation and patch orchestration quality-of-life tool designed to eliminate structural friction in hardware-hacking workflows.

mechanisms.name: Toolchain Automation
mechanisms.desc: Streamlines the building, patching, and runtime setup of complex toolchains for embedded reverse engineering.

mechanisms.name: Cross-Platform
mechanisms.desc: Native cross-platform stability supporting modern GCC/Clang compilers alongside mobile-tier Termux (Android) environments.

pfat.title: PFAT — Professional Interactive Firmware Audit Tool
pfat.overview: Moving beyond monolithic, slow scanners with a modular, surgical approach to static security analysis within embedded filesystems.

mechanisms.name: Structural Detection
mechanisms.desc: Engines targeted at exposing hardcoded backend credentials, hidden private encryption keys, and active shell backdoors.

wardrive.title: Wardrive Audit Tool — Wireless Security Intelligence Engine
stack: Python (Standard Library Only — Zero External Dependencies)
wardrive.overview: A tailored parser and analytical suite engineered to process massive, raw Wigle wireless survey data logs.

mechanisms.name: Multi-threaded Processor
mechanisms.desc: Capable of parsing 10,000+ access points simultaneously.

mechanisms.name: Structural Auditing
mechanisms.desc: Mapping out active encryption weaknesses (WPA3/WPA2/WEP), WPS firmware vulnerabilities, and RF spectrum coverage anomalies.
